decisions.title: Auth uses magic links, no passwords
decisions.rationale: Passwords create support burden and shared-terminal risk; magic links keep auth simple and recoverable.

decisions.title: Billing must use Stripe, no Paddle
decisions.rationale: Stripe handles tax, dunning, and invoices; we will not build or adopt a second payment adapter.

decisions.title: Onboarding must have a single entry point, no alternate flows
decisions.rationale: Multiple onboarding flows fragment analytics and make it impossible to measure activation.
